title: make install does not install headers
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I am in the process of packaging yosys for [conan, a c/c++ package manager](https://conan.io/) with the final aim to have it published at [ConanCenter](https://conan.io/center/).

Part of the conan build process is testing whether the library can be used correctly.
This requires the install prefix to contain headers to include.

But `make install` does not install any headers in the `include` subdirectory.

## Expected behavior

* Headers are installed in the `include` subdirectory of the `$(PREFIX)` (configurable default)
* These headers can be used to effectively embed yosys in applications

## Actual behavior

* No headers are installed, no `include` directory is installed in the install prefix.
* Only `bin`, `lib` and `share` exist
